---

## India: DPDPA Under Judicial Scrutiny

India's Supreme Court has commenced hearings on petitions challenging the constitutional validity of the Digital Personal Data Protection Act (DPDPA) and its associated 2025 Rules. The court has issued notice to the government regarding concerns that certain provisions of the DPDPA may dilute the Right to Information (RTI) Act.
([Source](https://news.google.?oc=5))

## India: DPDPA Implementation and Industry Readiness

The DPDPA introduces India's first unified framework for personal data protection, fundamentally altering how data is collected and processed. Discussions are ongoing about the practical implementation of the DPDP Rules 2025, with experts highlighting the Act's operational impacts on areas like data breaches, cross-border transfers, and adtech platforms, while also noting potential "regulatory blind spots" and the significant compliance burden, especially for startups. In response, companies like Netskope are launching India-specific solutions to assist businesses with DPDPA compliance.
([Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirwFBVV95cUxNV3d4RTVaMFk3M3dYNjFmQzhmTnNQUzVtOXpWbkhuR1hZU0NiZVk0T3R2Zk5aSE52d0l2QUprV2tWZjZZNUtMcTFxOWtvaDcxd0w5NU5xby02TXZuWEVLblhJb0RYTmdpcmdYNWN6enpxX1ZmSS1vMEdkakVaT0NPRFF0dFlVY21ibmJQY1NQSnlHbDhDS0l5ZXdzWmpqbEd3cFN5LTM0WUJTbjg4cE93?oc=5))
([Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMijAFBVV95cUxOSjQwcU1oTFlXZ0taQmdGQzI1dm5ralhINFUyTjlZNzZtYmg1b0JuYUZydDZlOVlfemQ1MU5LVl9RVDF5a2QyNWI2bXZWcXByTFJRYmszRmpRZnE4TXVCX2MySUZJSkpVLVFwOHFyaklFdHBuZXA5dlE5Ymw0R3JuY2xLcDFkVXBNNV9YbA?oc=5))
([Source](https://news.google.?oc=5))

**Why it matters:** The ongoing Supreme Court challenges to the DPDPA highlight critical questions about the balance between privacy, governance, and fundamental rights in India, while businesses grapple with the practicalities of implementing this new, comprehensive data protection regime.
